subcodes.first_line: O thou who art being nursed at the breast of the love of God! How blessed art thou to have entered the world of existence
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شیرخوار از پستان محبه الله چقدر خوش بخت بودی که در ظل عنایت از اصلاب اهل
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @love of God
